obsessed.title: OBSESSED, NOT OBLIGATED
obsessed.description: I don't code because I have to. I code because it consumes me. This passion shows in every pixel, every line, every detail. It's visceral.

human.title: HUMAN > PROTOCOL
human.description: Tech is a tool. Humans are the heart. Exchanging, understanding real needs, building authentic connections. The best projects are born from real conversations.

philosophy.quote: The details are not the details. They make the design.

underTheFlow.description: Hip-hop live sessions platform with an immersive experience for artists and fans.
underTheFlow.longDescription:
Under The Flow is a platform dedicated to hip-hop live sessions.
The project captures the essence of freestyle and live performances, offering a unique showcase for emerging artists on the French hip-hop scene.

An immersive web experience that highlights music and artists with a strong, modern artistic direction.

intro.title: THE VISION
intro.content: Creating a platform that captures the raw energy of hip-hop live sessions. A space where music comes alive through digital.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Conveying the authenticity and energy of live through a web interface. Creating an immersive experience without sacrificing performance.

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: Next.js for performance and SEO. Dark, contrasted design to highlight video content. Smooth animations to reinforce immersion.

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: A platform that shines a light on the French live hip-hop scene with a strong, memorable visual identity.

victorDenay.description: Creative portfolio for a professional videographer and photographer.
victorDenay.longDescription:
Custom portfolio for Victor Denay, videographer and photographer.
A clean design that gives center stage to the artist's visual work, with smooth transitions and intuitive navigation.

The goal was to create a digital showcase that elevates the work while offering a memorable browsing experience.

intro.title: THE BRIEF
intro.content: A portfolio that steps back to let the work shine. Minimalist but impactful, subtle but memorable.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Presenting high-quality video and photo content without compromising load times. Creating a smooth, intuitive gallery.

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: Mobile-first design. Smart lazy loading. Polished transitions between projects. Minimalist typography.

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: An elegant portfolio that showcases Victor's work while delivering a premium user experience.

depenseMan.description: Simple and effective personal finance management application.
depenseMan.longDescription:
Dépense Man is a progressive web app (PWA) for managing monthly finances in a simple, intuitive way. No unnecessary complexity, just the essential features to track expenses.

A minimalist approach to personal budgeting, accessible on all devices with a clear interface and relevant visualizations.

intro.title: THE NEED
intro.content: A budget app without the complexity of banking solutions. Simple, fast, effective.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Making budget management enjoyable. Creating an interface people actually want to use regularly.

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: PWA for offline access. Clean interface. Clear expense visualizations. Smart categorization.

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: An app I use daily to manage my finances. Simple, but does exactly what you ask of it.

linekut.description: Image to cutting pattern converter for scroll saw, laser, and vinyl cutting.
linekut.longDescription:
Linekut transforms any image into a ready-to-cut pattern. Whether for scroll saw, laser cutting, vinyl, or stickers, the tool generates optimized files for each technique.

A PWA that democratizes cutting pattern creation, making an usually complex process accessible.

intro.title: THE IDEA
intro.content: Simplifying cutting pattern creation. Transform a photo into a machine-ready file in just a few clicks.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Client-side image processing for speed. Vectorization algorithms and contour simplification.

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: Canvas API for image processing. Edge detection algorithms. Export in standard formats (SVG, DXF).

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: A tool used by makers and craftspeople to quickly create custom cutting patterns.

blenkdev.description: Showcase website for a freelance web development agency specialized in custom solutions.
blenkdev.longDescription:
BlenkDev is the showcase website for my freelance web development activity.
A platform that presents my services, approach and portfolio in a clear and professional manner.

The goal: inspire trust and demonstrate my expertise through a modern visual identity and detailed case studies.

intro.title: THE MISSION
intro.content: Create a professional online presence for my freelance activity. A website that inspires trust and demonstrates my technical expertise.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Stand out in a saturated market by highlighting my unique skills and client-centered approach.

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: Modern and clean design. Showcase of completed projects. Clear services section. Client testimonials for credibility.

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: A showcase website that converts visitors into potential clients and reflects my professional identity.
